assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:30020 event with d tag matching the auction id in content, and stall_id set to 'crypto-collectibles-stall'
assertion_results.evidence: kind:30020 event with d tag "trezor-one-0042-auction" matches content id. stall_id: "crypto-collectibles-stall" correct

assertion_results.text: The auction content has starting_bid as an integer (500000), duration as 259200, and start_date as a Unix timestamp
assertion_results.evidence: starting_bid: 500000 (integer), duration: 259200 (integer), start_date: 1736899200 (Unix timestamp for Jan 15 2025 00:00 UTC)

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1021 bid event where the content is the bid amount and tags include an e tag referencing the auction event ID
assertion_results.evidence: kind:1021 event with content "750000" and e tag referencing a 64-char hex event ID

assertion_results.text: The bid's e tag references an event ID (64-char hex or placeholder), NOT a product UUID or d-tag value
assertion_results.evidence: e tag value: "a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2" — 64-char hex placeholder, not a d-tag or UUID

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1022 bid confirmation with status 'accepted' and duration_extended set to 600 (10 minutes in seconds)
assertion_results.evidence: kind:1022 event with content containing status:"accepted" and duration_extended:600

assertion_results.text: The accepted bid confirmation has two e tags: one for the bid event ID and one for the auction event ID
assertion_results.evidence: Accepted confirmation tags: ["e","f7e8...f7e8"] (bid ID) and ["e","a1b2...a1b2"] (auction ID) — two e tags present

assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:1022 event with status 'winner' for the winning bid
assertion_results.evidence: kind:1022 event with content containing status:"winner"

assertion_results.text: The winner confirmation also has two e tags referencing both the winning bid and the auction
assertion_results.evidence: Winner confirmation tags: ["e","1a2b...1a2b"] (winning bid, different from earlier) and ["e","a1b2...a1b2"] (auction ID) — two e tags
